allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 1 --short-name "day-view-journal" "Refine the Day View of the personal CRM app to remove gamification and return to a calm bullet-journal workflow.")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 8 --short-name "log-ux-refine" "Refine the logging and note/task UX of the personal CRM app with better linking, clearer task identity, improved gestures, and polished input card styling.")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 9 --short-name "ui-polish" "Refine the composer, task cards, note/task presentation, and tab bar design of the personal CRM app so the experience feels more cohesive, polished, and aligned with the calm bullet-journal style.")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 10 --short-name "day-view-polish" "Refine the Day View of the personal CRM app to improve clarity, hierarchy, and visual cohesion while keeping the calm bullet-journal style.")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 11 --short-name "life-log" "Implement a major UX and product model simplification for Antra. Remove the current task-centric and day-centric structure and replace it with a life log + follow-up system.")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 12 --short-name "composer-redesign" "Adjust the Day View composer and timeline behavior for a cleaner and more focused logging experience. Redesign bottom composer with 2-row structure, collapsed/expanded states, action row with person linking and follow-up, cancel behavior, back-to-today button, and timeline bottom fade.")
